blurbs.postAuthGuestStart:
```xml
<intent>start an anonymous guest session and get a JWT token</intent>
<required>none</required>
<auth>none</auth>
<gotchas>returned JWT expires after 30 days and must be used as Bearer token in Authorization header for subsequent calls</gotchas>
```
blurbs.postApiTokenActivate:
```xml
<intent>activate my subscription and get an API token for programmatic access</intent>
<required>none</required>
<auth>required; httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>request must be cryptographically signed by user's wallet; supports legacy, standard matrix, and custom matrix subscription modes differentiated by leagues array parameter</gotchas>
```
blurbs.postApiGuestPurchaseQuote:
```xml
<intent>get a purchase quote for buying TxLINE tokens by providing my wallet public key and desired amount</intent>
<required>none</required>
<auth>required; httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>returned transaction is partially signed and requires user wallet signature before submission; wallet must have active USDT ATA with sufficient balance</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiFixturesSnapshot:
```xml
<intent>get the current snapshot of all fixtures, optionally filtered by competition or start date</intent>
<required>none</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>returns a point-in-time snapshot rather than live updates; startEpochDay limits results to 30-day window after that date</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiFixturesUpdatesEpochdayHourofday:
```xml
<intent>what fixture updates occurred during a specific hour on a particular day</intent>
<required>epochDay (integer), hourOfDay (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>returns updates for a single one-hour window within a day, not a full day or multi-day range</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiFixturesValidation:
```xml
<intent>get the merkle proof to cryptographically verify a fixture update was published by the oracle</intent>
<required>fixtureId (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>returns proof branch only, not the root; requires on-chain validation with fixture record to complete verification; optional timestamp parameter selects specific hourly batch</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiFixturesBatch-validation:
```xml
<intent>get a merkle proof to cryptographically verify the integrity of a batch of fixtures for a specific hour</intent>
<required>epochDay (integer), hourOfDay (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>returns merkle proof and metadata for batch validation against on-chain published root hash; operates on hourly batches, not individual fixtures</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiOddsSnapshotFixtureid:
```xml
<intent>what are the current or historical odds for a specific sports fixture across all market lines</intent>
<required>fixtureId (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>returns live snapshot within current 5-minute interval by default; use asOf parameter to retrieve historical odds at a specific point in time</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiOddsUpdatesFixtureid:
```xml
<intent>What are the current live odds updates available for a specific fixture right now?</intent>
<required>fixtureId (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>Returns only cached data from the most recent 5-minute window; reflects current in-memory odds offers, not historical data</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiOddsUpdatesEpochdayHourofdayInterv:
```xml
<intent>get historical odds updates for a specific 5-minute time interval</intent>
<required>epochDay (integer), hourOfDay (integer), interval (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>returns point-in-time snapshot of odds changes from a specific past 5-minute bucket; can filter by fixtureId</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiOddsStream:
```xml
<intent>get a live stream of real-time odds updates for sports fixtures</intent>
<required>none</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>this is a long-lived Server-Sent Events stream with data messages (id format: timestamp:index) and heartbeat events; optional fixtureId filters by fixture and Last-Event-ID resumes from a previous point</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiOddsValidation:
```xml
<intent>get the merkle proof for a specific odds update to verify it on-chain</intent>
<required>messageId (string), ts (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>returns cryptographic proof branch for single odds update identified by messageId; proof reconstructs merkle root committed to blockchain</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiScoresSnapshotFixtureid:
```xml
<intent>Get snapshots of score events and actions for a specific fixture</intent>
<required>fixtureId (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>Returns point-in-time snapshots of the latest score events with action details, not a live stream. Optional asOf parameter allows historical snapshots.</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiScoresUpdatesEpochdayHourofdayInte:
```xml
<intent>retrieve historical score updates from a specific 5-minute interval in the past</intent>
<required>epochDay (integer), hourOfDay (integer), interval (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>returns only archived historical data, not live streams; requires epoch day, hour, and interval parameters to pinpoint exact 5-minute window</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiScoresUpdatesFixtureid:
```xml
<intent>what are the latest score updates for a specific sports fixture right now</intent>
<required>fixtureId (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>returns updates within current 5-minute interval only; live data included if available</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiScoresHistoricalFixtureid:
```xml
<intent>What are all the historical score updates for a specific fixture?</intent>
<required>fixtureId (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>Fixture must have started between 6 hours and 2 weeks ago; returns complete sequence of all score changes during the match</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiScoresStream:
```xml
<intent>subscribe to live real-time updates of scores as they change</intent>
<required>none</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>long-lived streaming connection using Server-Sent Events; includes heartbeat messages; optional fixtureId filters to specific fixture; optional Last-Event-ID parameter for resuming streams</gotchas>
```
blurbs.getApiScoresStat-validation:
```xml
<intent>Get cryptographic Merkle proof for a score statistic to verify it on-chain</intent>
<required>fixtureId (integer), seq (integer), statKey (integer)</required>
<auth>required; apiKeyAuth or httpAuth</auth>
<gotchas>Returns three-level Merkle proofs connecting individual stat(s) to on-chain batch root; optionally supports second stat via statKey2 for two-stat predicates</gotchas>
```
